timeline.title: Early Life
timeline.story: Born in present-day Uttar Pradesh, Neera Arya later became one of the remarkable women associated with India's freedom struggle.

timeline.title: Joining the INA
timeline.story: She joined the Indian National Army and worked in support of the movement led by Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose.

timeline.title: Secret Missions
timeline.story: Accounts describe her carrying out dangerous intelligence-related missions for the INA during the freedom movement.

timeline.title: Sacrifice
timeline.story: She endured imprisonment and hardship in service of the struggle for India's independence.

timeline.title: Legacy
timeline.story: Neera Arya is remembered by many as a courageous participant in the freedom movement, though historical documentation of some accounts about her life is limited.
